div.div:
OllamaClient internals:
1. Try primary model
2. Retry with backoff (3×, 1.5ⁿ s)
3. If circuit opens → try fallback models
4. Circuit resets after 30 s

div.div:
Tool Cache:
• SHA-256 key from (name, args)
• 60 s TTL — skip AWS API call if cached
• Module-level singleton
